title: HEAD OF LEGAL ADVISORY | COMMERCIAL BANKING AND DIGITAL PLATFORMS
details: Legal Business Partner: transform the legal team from a reactive support unit into a proactive strategic partner.
Fortified the Bank’s Digital Future: Spearheaded legal frameworks for the bank’s digital platform and mobile banking app.
Increased Productivity in Traditional Products: draft contract templates and implement contract deviation matrix to fasten the process while mitigating risks better.
Responsible for complicated banking products such as derivatives, project finance, securitization, etc.

title: SENIOR LAWYER
company: PTT Global Chemical Public Company Limited
details: Led complex commercial transactions: M&A and restructuring of overseas upstream petrochemical business.
Issuance and offering of senior unsecure notes of US$ 1,250 million listed on SGX-ST.
Mentored junior lawyers, instilling a mindset of precision, resilience, and purpose.

title: SPECIALIST
details: From syndicated loan, investment agreements, to digital project among banks.
One of the largest M&A deal: TMB-Thanachart.
EBT: Restructuring and entire business transfer of TMB’s subsidiary (PAMC).

title: LEGAL MANAGER, THAILAND AND MYANMAR
details: Business swap project with Boehringer Ingelheim.

title: ASSISTANT LEGAL MANAGER
company: SCB Life Assurance Public Company Limited
details: Managed one of the biggest projects of the Company—Agency Project.

title: ASSOCIATE
details: Supported start-ups with BOI applications, foreign business licensing, and general corporate matters.
